news.headline: Gluware presents Gruve AI at ONUG Fall 2024, showcasing case studies and AI-powered Co-Pilots. Keynote in Sacramento, on Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Gluware, a leading provider of intelligent network automation, has revealed its upcoming appearances at the AI Networking Summit. The event is scheduled to take place in Sacramento, California on October 22, 2024. Gluware disclosed that they will be showcasing a case study keynote alongside a demonstration of their AI-driven Co-Pilots. These presentations are part of the company's participation in ONUG.

news.headline: GU collaborates with luxury brand rokh to offer elegance at affordable prices. Joining forces for originality.
news.summary: Two renowned brands, GU and rokh, are teaming up to offer elegance and originality at an affordable price point. GU, a sister brand of UNIQLO under the Fast Retailing Group, has partnered with rokh, a well-known fashion brand. This collaboration aims to bring high-quality, stylish clothing to the masses. The exciting launch of this partnership was announced on October 22, 2024 in New York. Stay tuned for the unique and accessible collection coming your way.

news.headline: Diwali at Times Square celebrates diversity and inclusion. Largest festival outside India, in 9th year since 2013.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, in New York City, the 9th annual Diwali festival at Times Square took place, established in 2013 as the largest celebration of Diwali outside of India. The festival aims to promote the values of love, peace, harmony, and togetherness associated with Diwali. Through this event, organizers hope to spread awareness and understanding of the significance of Diwali to a wider audience.

news.headline: Join NexPoint's webinar to learn how to vote for change in UDF IV's Board of Trustees election. Meet nominee John A. Good.
news.summary: Discover how to cast your vote for a strategic shift in a crucial Board of Trustees election. Gain insights from candidate John A. Good regarding NexPoint's strategy to safeguard your interests and enhance value. The election is set to take place in Dallas on October 22, 2024. NexPoint Real Estate Opportunities, LLC and its affiliates are at the forefront of this movement. Make sure your voice is heard in this significant election.

news.headline: BOE Governor Bailey discusses the importance of new surveillance tools.
Ekati Diamond Mine hits milestone: 100 million carats produced by Burgundy Diamond Mines.
news.summary: Burgundy Diamond Mines recently celebrated a significant achievement as the Ekati Diamond Mine surpassed a monumental milestone by producing 100 million carats of diamonds. This achievement marks a historic moment for the mine and highlights its significant contribution to the diamond industry. The Ekati Diamond Mine's impressive production of 100 million carats underscores its importance and solidifies its position as a key player in the global diamond market.

news.headline: APAC Sustainable Data Center Market to hit $22.91B by 2029, from $9.68B in 2023, CAGR of 15.44%. China, Australia, Japan, India drive growth.
news.summary: In Dublin, the APAC Sustainable Data Center Market report has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offering. Valued at USD 9.68 billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach USD 22.91 billion by 2029, with a notable CAGR of 15.44%. Key countries like China, Australia, Japan, India, Thailand, Indonesia, Singapore, and Malaysia are at the forefront of the Asia-Pacific sustainable data center development.

news.headline: JPMorgan CEO privately backs Kamala Harris, opposes Trump, but won’t publicly disclose due to possible backlash.
news.summary: The CEO of JPMorgan has privately expressed his backing for the vice president and his disapproval of Donald Trump to close contacts. However, due to concerns about potential backlash, he refrains from making these sentiments known publicly.

news.headline: Fiserv reports 7% revenue increase to $5.22 billion, adjusted EPS at $2.30, up 17%. Stock price drops despite growth.
news.summary: Fiserv, Inc. (FI) released its fiscal third-quarter results, showcasing a 7% year-over-year increase in revenue to $5.22 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $4.91 billion. Adjusted revenue rose by 7% year-over-year to $4.88 billion. The financial technology and services provider reported an adjusted EPS of $2.30, which exceeded the analyst consensus of $2.26. This marks a 17% increase from the previous year. Despite the strong performance, the stock price dropped post-announcement. Organic revenue saw a significant 15% growth, with Merchant Solutions leading the way at a 24% increase. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Introducing HuggingChat: the free open-source chatbot challenging ChatGPT with custom assistants and multimodality.
news.summary: HuggingChat provides open-source options that rival top chatbots, offering a range of features such as custom assistants, model versatility, internet connectivity, and multimodality. This platform gives users access to advanced chatbot capabilities without any constraints.

news.headline: Cometeer launches 2024 holiday edition Advent Calendar with 24 unique coffee capsules from top roasters and farmers.
news.summary: In Gloucester, Massachusetts, on October 22, 2024, Cometeer announced a special release for the 2024 holiday season - the Cometeer Coffee Advent Calendar. This calendar includes 24 distinctive capsules of specialty coffee sourced from leading roasters and farmers. The limited-edition Advent Calendar offers coffee enthusiasts a unique way to experience a variety of premium coffees throughout the holiday season.

news.headline: Hometap names Tom Egan as CFO, part of a growth strategy as company reaches $1 billion in capital deployed and assets.
news.summary: In Boston, a financial technology company called Hometap has appointed Tom Egan as their new Chief Financial Officer. Egan will be reporting to Hometap's Chief Executive Officer, Jeffrey Glass. This appointment is seen as a strategic move to further strengthen Hometap's success, especially as the company has recently exceeded $1 billion in both capital deployed and assets under management.

news.headline: 2024 ¡Tú Cuentas! Cine Youth Fest winners announced in Brooklyn, NY: 1st Place - $4,000 Grand Prize to Franco Vidal for "Hot Latin Nights at the Granada!"
news.summary: In Brooklyn, New York, the winners of the 2024 short film competition at the ¡Tú Cuentas! Cine Youth Fest, presented by HITN-TV, were revealed. This event by the top Spanish-language public broadcaster showcased works by 10 talented Latino filmmakers nationwide. The top honor, the 1st Place - $4,000 Grand Prize, went to "Hot Latin Nights at the Granada!" created by Peruvian filmmaker Franco Vidal, who operates from Los Angeles.

news.headline: Share price of Trump Media surges despite internal struggles at Truth Social, primary platform for ex-President Trump. Staff raise concerns to board.
news.summary: Workers have raised concerns with the board regarding hiring and management procedures at the parent company of Truth Social, the primary online platform for former President Donald Trump.

news.headline: EF Go Ahead Tours introduces Mystery Tours with biggest savings ever before Black Friday shopping, addressing traveler demands to explore destinations during "Shoulder Seasons." BOSTON, Oct. 22, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: As travelers increasingly seek to explore destinations during lesser-known "Shoulder Seasons," a response to decision fatigue, EF Go Ahead Tours, a prominent guided group tours company, has launched new Mystery Tours and Black Friday deals. The move caters to this trend and addresses the demand for unique travel experiences. This initiative, coinciding with Black Friday, aims to provide customers with exciting options while combatting decision fatigue. The company's effort to meet travelers' needs includes offering appealing deals during this period, aligning with the growing interest in Shoulder Seasons.

news.headline: PulteGroup beats Q3 estimates with $4.48B revenue, 12% increase in home closings (7,924) and average sales price of $548K.
news.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE:PHM) saw a decrease in stock value following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The company reported revenue of $4.48 billion, surpassing the expected $4.26 billion. Home sale revenues increased by 12% to $4.3 billion, attributed to a 12% rise in closings to 7,924 homes and an average sales price of $548,000 (unchanged from last year). The gross margin for home sales was 28.8%, down from 29.5% the previous year. Net new orders dropped to 7,031 from 7,065 homes, but the value saw a 3% increase to $3.9 billion.

news.headline: Moody's beats Q3 estimates with $3.21 EPS, $1.81B sales, 41% revenue growth in MIS segment. Stock fell post report.
news.summary: Moody’s Corp (NYSE:MCO) saw a decline in its stock value following the release of its third-quarter results. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of $3.21 for the quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations of $2.86. Quarterly sales amounted to $1.81 billion, exhibiting a 23% increase compared to the previous year and topping the anticipated $1.7 billion. Moody’s Analytics experienced a 7% revenue growth from the same period last year, while Moody’s Investors Service (MIS) achieved an impressive 41% revenue expansion.

news.headline: Prosus CEO advises understanding AI for trust; tune in for details.
Point Mortgage enters Fort Wayne, IN with competitive solutions. Licensed in 32 states, eyes Allen County.
news.summary: Point Mortgage, a renowned mortgage provider licensed in 32 states, is thrilled to introduce competitive mortgage solutions to homebuyers in Indiana's Fort Wayne/Allen County region. The expansion marks Point Mortgage's entrance into a new market, offering their trusted services to a wider customer base. The company will bring its expertise and industry experience to provide residents in Allen County with a range of mortgage options. This move signifies Point Mortgage's commitment to growth and dedication to catering to the needs of homebuyers.

news.headline: Rackspace Technology secures seat on OpenInfra Foundation board to support OpenStack's growth amid rising demand for flexible, cost-effective hybrid cloud solutions.
news.summary: The recent resurgence of OpenStack can be attributed to the increasing demand for cost-effective solutions, flexible open infrastructure, and hybrid cloud environments. These factors have led to a significant rise in the adoption of OpenStack, with a reported increase of X% in usage over the past year. Organizations are turning to OpenStack to gain more control over their expenses while also benefiting from the versatility of an open infrastructure that supports hybrid cloud deployments. This shift in the market emphasizes the importance of cost containment, scalability, and adaptability in today's cloud computing landscape.

news.headline: General Motors beats Q3 earnings with $2.96 per share, surpassing estimates by 18.88%, with revenue at $48.76 billion, 10.85% higher.
news.summary: General Motors reported quarterly earnings of $2.96 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.49. This is up from $2.28 per share a year ago. The company posted revenues of $48.76 billion for the quarter, surpassing estimates by 10.85% and up from $44.13 billion in the previous year. This marked an 18.88% earnings surprise and the company has exceeded EPS estimates four times in the last four quarters. The stock's future movement will likely depend on management's commentary during the earnings call. General Motors shares have shown positive momentum as a result.

news.headline: Eaton declares quarterly dividend of $0.94 per share, payable on November 22, 2024, for shareholders as of November 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, the Board of Directors at Eaton (NYSE:ETN) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.94 per ordinary share, to be paid on November 22, 2024, to shareholders on record as of November 4, 2024. Having distributed dividends annually since 1923, Eaton focuses on intelligent power management, aiming to enhance environmental protection and overall quality of life globally.

news.headline: Equity Trust launches Private Fund Custody Solutions, with $52 billion in assets under custody.
news.summary: An announcement was made in Westlake, Ohio on October 22, 2024, regarding Equity Trust Company, a prominent player in self-directed IRAs. With a 50-year history in the industry, the company manages an impressive $52 billion in assets under custody and administration. They have recently launched their Private Fund Custody Solutions, where they act as a Qualified Custodian.

news.headline: Pulmonary Fibrosis Foundation names Dr. Amy Hajari Case as Chief Medical Officer in 2024. #Chicago #PFF #PF #Research.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, the Pulmonary Fibrosis Foundation (PFF) named Amy Hajari Case, MD, FCCP, as the Chief Medical Officer. PFF, a prominent organization in PF research, education, and advocacy, made this announcement. Dr. Hajari Case, who currently serves as Director, will take on the new role.

news.headline: Tiger Pistol launches playbook for QSR loyalty programs, emphasizing local digital ads to boost engagement and sales.
news.summary: "The Next Step in QSR Loyalty Programs" delves into the potential of data-driven solutions to empower Quick Service Restaurant (QSR) brands. By sharing loyalty data and utilizing local advertising, engagement, sales, and retention can significantly increase. Tiger Pistol, a leading local advertising platform, hosted this discussion in Cleveland on Oct. 22, 2024. This innovative strategy can revolutionize QSR businesses by leveraging customer information and targeted advertising to drive growth.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Blinken in a meeting with Israel's Prime Minister Netanyahu: I underscored the need to capitalize on Israel's action to bring Sinwar to justice by securing hostage release and ending the conflict in Gaza - Statement.
A Closer Look (ACL) wins Inc. Power Partner Award, honored for transformative insights and revenue growth.
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in customer experience research has recently been acknowledged for their exceptional ability to provide valuable insights that contribute to revenue growth. On October 22, 2024, A Closer Look (ACL) was honored by being included in Inc. magazine's prestigious 2024 Power Partner Awards list. This recognition highlights ACL as one of the most reliable B2B partners in the country, underscoring their vital role in enabling businesses to thrive. This acknowledgment signifies the company's commitment to delivering transformative findings that positively impact their clients' bottom lines.

news.headline: Associated Bank appoints Rick Bruhn as SVP and Head of Specialty Deposits and Payment Solutions on October 22, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on October 22, 2024, it was disclosed that Rick Bruhn has taken on the role of senior vice president and head of Specialty Deposits and Payment Solutions at Associated Banc-Corp, a renowned bank listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ASB. Bruhn's appointment is significant as he brings valuable expertise to Associated Bank. This move is expected to have a notable impact on the bank's operations in these key areas.

news.headline: "New show Go Fund Yourself premieres at Million Dollar Weekend, featuring keynote by Jayson Waller, connecting entrepreneurs and investors instantly."
news.summary: Cutting-edge crowdfunding service enables immediate interaction between entrepreneurs and investors, fostering real-time connections. The platform has successfully connected over 10,000 entrepreneurs with 5,000 investors, facilitating the launch of numerous innovative projects. Investors have collectively contributed over $5 million to support various ventures through this groundbreaking platform.

news.headline: Avery Dennison to report $2.33 EPS on Oct 23; past performance saw a price drop despite beating estimates. Shares up 25.93% over 52-week period. Consensus rating: Outperform with $248.43 average price target.
news.summary: Avery Dennison (AVY) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on October 23, 2024, with analysts predicting an EPS of $2.33. Investors are eager for the results and hopeful for surpassing estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as market reactions are often guided by such outlooks. In the previous earnings release, the company exceeded EPS by $0.16, leading to a 2.62% dip in share price afterward. Avery Dennison's past performance shows mixed results in EPS estimates versus actuals, with variable price changes in response. As of October 21, AVY shares were at $215.41, marking a 25.93% increase over the last 52 weeks. Analysts, reflecting market sentiments, rate Avery Dennison as Outperform with a one-year price target of $248.43. Investors are advised to stay informed about industry expectations to make informed decisions.

news.headline: Quest Diagnostics beat Q3 earnings estimates with $2.30 EPS, sales rose 8.5% to $2.49B. CEO expects growth with new customers and acquisitions.
news.summary: Quest Diagnostics Inc (NYSE: DGX) announced third-quarter adjusted earnings per share of $2.30, surpassing the expected $2.26 consensus. Sales showed a notable 8.5% year-over-year increase, reaching $2.49 billion, higher than the predicted $2.42 billion. The company's total revenue growth also reached 8.5%, with 4.2% stemming from organic growth as highlighted by Quest Diagnostics CEO Jim Davis. He attributed the strong performance to securing new customers, expanding relationships with physicians and hospitals, and recent acquisitions like LifeLabs. Davis mentioned that the company is currently on track to finalize eight acquisitions meeting their criteria by the end of the year.

news.headline: Brooklyn Brewery launches "Calling All Makers" grant program to support creative innovators across five disciplines in Brooklyn.
news.summary: A new "Calling All Makers" grant program has been launched by Brooklyn Brewery in Brooklyn, N.Y. This initiative aims to champion creativity in various fields by offering support and recognition. Brooklyn Brewery, well-known for its role in the craft beer industry, is committed to nurturing innovation within its community. The program seeks to empower individuals who show promise in making a positive impact. This initiative reflects the brewery's dedication to fostering creativity, with the goal of supporting and celebrating makers across different disciplines.

news.headline: Uniswap's price up 8.08% in 24 hours to $8.13, 5.0% gain in past week. Hits all-time high of $44.92.
news.summary: Uniswap's (CRYPTO: UNI) price surged by 8.08% in the last 24 hours, reaching $8.13. This uptrend follows a positive trajectory over the past week, with a 5.0% increase from $7.75. Currently, the coin's all-time high stands at $44.92. This data reflects the price movement and volatility of UNI.

news.headline: Chainlink's price has risen 4.33% in 24 hours to $12.15, with an 8.0% gain in the past week, hitting an all-time high of $52.70.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of Chainlink (CRYPTO: LINK) has increased by 4.33% to $12.15. This uptrend follows a positive week for the cryptocurrency, with an 8.0% rise from $11.13 to its current value. Chainlink's all-time high is recorded at $52.70. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Chainlink over the specified period. The full report is accessible on a financial news website.

news.headline: Aptos cryptocurrency price increases by 6% in 24 hours to $10.63, showing a positive trend with a 4% gain over the week. All-time high at $19.92.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of Aptos (CRYPTO: APT) has increased by 6.0% to reach $10.63. This upward movement continues the positive trend seen over the past week, with a 4.0% gain from $10.27 to its current price. The all-time high for the coin stands at $19.92. For a more detailed comparison of price movement and volatility, refer to the chart provided.

news.headline: Sui's cryptocurrency price drops 4.87% in 24 hours, now at $1.93 from $2.09, a 10% decline in the week.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Sui (CRYPTO: SUI) dropped by 4.87% to $1.93, extending its downward trajectory from the past week with a 10.0% decrease, falling from $2.09. The comparison chart displays the price fluctuations and volatility for Sui in the past 24 hours.

news.headline: Raise the Rates Coalition demands increased social assistance rates at Queen’s Park for 1 million Ontarians falling below poverty line by $1,569 or $575 per month.
news.summary: In Toronto, there is a glaring disparity between the financial support provided by the government and the actual needs of residents. Approximately one million individuals in Ontario depend on social assistance, with recipients of Ontario Works (OW) falling $1,569 below the poverty line each month, while those on the Ontario Disability Support Program (ODSP) fare slightly better but still lack $575 monthly. This significant gap highlights the challenges faced by vulnerable populations trying to make ends meet amidst rising living costs.

news.headline: HKMA cautions against fake Bank Julius Baer sites targeting clients. Report suspicious activities to secure your funds.
news.summary: A public alert has been issued by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding fake websites and phishing attempts posing as Bank Julius Baer. Individuals are advised to be wary and report any dubious activity.

news.headline: Regina Lee named Global Leader of Risk, Forensics & Compliance business at Ankura Consulting Group with 25 years experience.
news.summary: In a recent update from New York on October 22, 2024, Ankura Consulting Group, LLC, a prominent global expert services and advisory firm, introduced Regina Lee as the new Global Leader of its Risk, Forensics, and Compliance sector. With over 25 years of experience, Regina Lee is set to lead this business segment.

news.headline: Intelligent Audit recognized as top freight audit provider in Logistics Tech Outlook magazine cover feature - Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, Intelligent Audit (IA), a prominent company specializing in transportation spend management, was recognized in Logistics Tech Outlook magazine as one of the leading providers of freight audit and payment solutions. The article showcased IA's innovative services and noted its position as a global leader in the industry.

news.headline: Global smart water metering market to reach $7.36 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 9.9% from $3.80 billion in 2023.
news.summary: The global smart water metering market is expected to grow significantly, with a projected market size of US$7.36 billion by 2031, up from US$3.80 billion in 2023. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.9% during the forecast period from 2023 to 2031. The report, released on October 22, 2024, by The Insight Partners highlights the increasing adoption of smart water technologies worldwide.

news.headline: Ascenda introduces new loyalty-as-a-service model, optimizing business outcomes for financial institutions worldwide.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, in New York City, Ascenda unveiled its latest loyalty-as-a-service solution, positioning itself as a highly interconnected rewards platform globally. This innovative offering aims to disrupt traditional industry standards and drive enhanced business results for financial institutions.

news.headline: Performio launches Plan Builder for incentive compensation management, offering unmatched flexibility and control.
news.summary: Performio, a top incentive compensation management (ICM) software provider, recently introduced Plan Builder in IRVINE, Calif., on October 22, 2024. According to the company, Plan Builder is recognized as the most user-friendly tool for creating and overseeing incentive compensation plans in the industry. This groundbreaking software is expected to revolutionize the way companies manage their compensation programs, increasing efficiency and accuracy. This announcement signifies a significant development in Performio's offerings, presenting a crucial milestone in their mission to streamline incentive compensation processes. With this innovation, Performio is set to maintain its position as a trailblazer in the ICM sector, solidifying its commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions to its clients.

news.headline: Verdek secures 3-year contract with State of California to supply EV chargers, highlighting commitment to sustainability.
news.summary: In Monroe, Connecticut, on October 22, 2024, Verdek, a prominent supplier of Electric Vehicle Charging Solutions, has officially revealed the successful acquisition of a significant 3-year agreement with the State of California. This pivotal deal highlights Verdek's dedication to promoting sustainable energy solutions and showcases their expertise in the field.

news.headline: FAA drops rule for 'No Smoking' sign off switch on planes post smoking ban; sign to remain on permanently.
news.summary: The Federal Aviation Administration has eliminated a regulation mandating an off switch for the no-smoking sign on U.S. flights, despite smoking being banned on these flights for several years.

news.headline: Teradyne (TER) to release Q3 earnings on 10/23, EPS expected at $0.78. Past results show EPS beat, causing 13.38% stock drop last quarter. Shares trading at $125.93, up 43.2% in 52-week period. Analyst consensus rating is Neutral.
news.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) is set to report its quarterly earnings on October 23, 2024, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.78. Investors are hopeful for positive news surpassing estimates and optimistic guidance for the next quarter. The past quarter saw Teradyne beating EPS estimates by $0.09, resulting in a 13.38% drop in share price the following day. As of October 21, Teradyne shares were trading at $125.93, showing a 43.2% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analysts have a neutral consensus rating for Teradyne based on 8 analyst ratings. Understanding market sentiments and industry expectations is key for investors.

news.headline: Nidec expected to announce quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23. Analysts estimate EPS of $0.07. Investors anticipate positive results.
news.summary: Nidec, trading under OTC symbol NJDCY, is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.07. Investors are anticipating the announcement, optimistic for results that exceed expectations and favorable future guidance.

news.headline: Raymond James Finl set to report Q3 earnings on 2024-10-23 with estimated EPS of $2.42. Investors hopeful for positive news.
news.summary: Raymond James Financial, listed as RJF on the NYSE, is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on October 23, 2024. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $2.42 for the company. Investors are eager for the announcement, anticipating that Raymond James Financial may exceed these estimates and offer positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. The market is hopeful for promising news from the company. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Las Vegas Sands to report Q3 earnings. Analysts estimate EPS at $0.54. Past performance and share prices noted, trading at $51.17. Analysts rate LVS as Outperform.
news.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on October 23, with analysts estimating an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.54. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for results that surpass estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company missed EPS by $0.01, resulting in a 2.43% drop in share price the next day. Las Vegas Sands's stock was trading at $51.17 on October 21, up 9.94% in the past 52-week period. Analysts have given the company an Outperform rating based on 12 ratings. Market reactions are often driven by guidance, so while earnings performance is key, future outlook will also be crucial for investor sentiment.

news.headline: Molina Healthcare (MOH) set to announce quarterly earnings with anticipated EPS of $5.96. Analysts rate it Neutral, with $368.3 price target suggesting 28.51% upside. Share price rose by 12.28% last quarter after surpassing earnings expectations. Market sentiment crucial for investors. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) is set to release its quarterly earnings report on Oct 23, 2024. Analysts predict an EPS of $5.96. In the last quarter, the company exceeded expectations by $0.31, resulting in a 12.28% share price increase the next day. Analysts have given Molina Healthcare a neutral consensus rating with an average one-year price target of $368.3, suggesting a potential 28.51% upside.
